tools.name: health_check
tools.description: Return current health status with a per-call UTC timestamp. Read-only; safe to call repeatedly.

agent_identity.description: Informational caller identity recorded in audit rows; authentication remains the Bearer token.

tools.name: get_version
tools.description: Return the process-stable VersionInfo (version, commit, built_at). Read-only; result is byte-stable per process.

agent_identity.description: Informational caller identity recorded in audit rows; authentication remains the Bearer token.

tools.name: get_self
tools.description: Return the authenticated Actor for the caller's Bearer token.

agent_identity.description: Informational caller identity recorded in audit rows; authentication remains the Bearer token.

tools.name: list_actors
tools.description: List active Actors with opaque cursor pagination. Read-only; deactivated Actors are excluded unless include_deactivated is true.

agent_identity.description: Informational caller identity recorded in audit rows; authentication remains the Bearer token.

tools.name: create_actor
tools.description: Create an Actor and mint its initial API key. Returns the plaintext key exactly once in this response.

agent_identity.description: Informational caller identity recorded in audit rows; authentication remains the Bearer token.

tools.name: revoke_api_key
tools.description: Revoke one of the caller Actor's API keys. Cross-actor attempts are forbidden and audited; revoking the last active key is blocked.

agent_identity.description: Informational caller identity recorded in audit rows; authentication remains the Bearer token.

tools.name: query_audit_log
tools.description: Query the append-only audit log with actor, operation, time-window, limit, and opaque cursor filters. Read-only and unaudited.

agent_identity.description: Informational caller identity recorded in audit rows; authentication remains the Bearer token.

tools.name: create_project
tools.description: Create a Project. Slug uniqueness is enforced globally.

agent_identity.description: Informational caller identity recorded in audit rows; authentication remains the Bearer token.

tools.name: list_projects
tools.description: List Projects with opaque cursor pagination. Archived Projects are excluded unless include_archived is true.

agent_identity.description: Informational caller identity recorded in audit rows; authentication remains the Bearer token.

tools.name: get_project
tools.description: Return one Project by UUID.

agent_identity.description: Informational caller identity recorded in audit rows; authentication remains the Bearer token.

tools.name: update_project
tools.description: Update mutable Project metadata by UUID.

agent_identity.description: Informational caller identity recorded in audit rows; authentication remains the Bearer token.

tools.name: archive_project
tools.description: Archive a Project by setting archived_at; rows are retained.

agent_identity.description: Informational caller identity recorded in audit rows; authentication remains the Bearer token.

tools.name: create_workflow
tools.description: Create Workflow v1 with an ordered set of step definitions.

agent_identity.description: Informational caller identity recorded in audit rows; authentication remains the Bearer token.

tools.name: list_workflows
tools.description: List Workflows with opaque cursor pagination. Archived Workflow versions are excluded unless include_archived is true.

agent_identity.description: Informational caller identity recorded in audit rows; authentication remains the Bearer token.

tools.name: get_workflow
tools.description: Return one Workflow version by UUID.

agent_identity.description: Informational caller identity recorded in audit rows; authentication remains the Bearer token.

tools.name: update_workflow
tools.description: Create the next Workflow version from a latest Workflow UUID. The prior row and prior steps are retained unchanged.

agent_identity.description: Informational caller identity recorded in audit rows; authentication remains the Bearer token.

tools.name: archive_workflow
tools.description: Archive every version in a Workflow slug family.

agent_identity.description: Informational caller identity recorded in audit rows; authentication remains the Bearer token.

tools.name: create_pipeline
tools.description: Create an ad-hoc Pipeline in a Project without a Workflow link.

agent_identity.description: Informational caller identity recorded in audit rows; authentication remains the Bearer token.

tools.name: instantiate_pipeline
tools.description: Instantiate a Pipeline snapshot from the latest non-archived Workflow slug family and create ready Jobs for each step.

agent_identity.description: Informational caller identity recorded in audit rows; authentication remains the Bearer token.

tools.name: list_pipelines
tools.description: List Pipelines with opaque cursor pagination.

agent_identity.description: Informational caller identity recorded in audit rows; authentication remains the Bearer token.

tools.name: get_pipeline
tools.description: Return one Pipeline by UUID.

agent_identity.description: Informational caller identity recorded in audit rows; authentication remains the Bearer token.

tools.name: update_pipeline
tools.description: Update mutable Pipeline metadata by UUID.

agent_identity.description: Informational caller identity recorded in audit rows; authentication remains the Bearer token.

tools.name: register_label
tools.description: Register a Project-scoped Label for future Job attachment.

agent_identity.description: Informational caller identity recorded in audit rows; authentication remains the Bearer token.

tools.name: attach_label
tools.description: Attach one registered Label to a Job's TEXT[] label cache.

agent_identity.description: Informational caller identity recorded in audit rows; authentication remains the Bearer token.

tools.name: detach_label
tools.description: Detach one Label from a Job's TEXT[] label cache.

agent_identity.description: Informational caller identity recorded in audit rows; authentication remains the Bearer token.
